title: Funk Bass Groove
summary: 98 BPM 70s funk instrumental - slap bass lead, syncopated drums, wah guitar, horn stabs.
prompt: A juicy 70s-style funk instrumental at 98 BPM led by the bass. Slap-and-pop electric bass running the main hook, syncopated drum break with crisp snare and tight hi-hats, wah-pedal rhythm guitar on the 16th notes, brass section punching horn stabs on the chorus, Rhodes piano comping in the background. Classic groove-driven funk with deep pocket and big horn arrangements.
